jobs_results.title: Senior Audit Associate
jobs_results.description: Analytical Engines Ltd is hiring a Senior Audit Associate to lead statutory audits for mid-market clients. You will manage engagements end to end, review workpapers, and mentor junior staff. Requires a CA qualification and 4+ years of audit experience.

jobs_results.title: Tax Manager
jobs_results.description: We are looking for a Tax Manager to own direct and indirect tax compliance across the group. This is a leadership role reporting to the Head of Finance.
